title: Pollinator Patrol
subtitle: Follow the flowers to the workers
learning_goal: Connect flowers with the insects that move pollen through a habitat.
intro: Every flower in the park is a landing pad. Find the blooms, then stake one out and log the crew that keeps the whole place growing.
outro: Scientists count pollinators on every continent, and your observations just joined that count. Patrol complete -- there's more park out there.

steps.description: Find a butterfly or a moth
steps.hint: Sunny flower patches are best. Move slowly and keep your shadow off them.

steps.description: Find a bee, wasp, or ant on the job
steps.hint: Pick one flower and watch it for a whole minute. Let the bee come to you.

steps.description: Find a flower visitor that's new to your Dex
steps.hint: Hoverflies look like bees but fly like helicopters. Good odds you don't have one yet.
